response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified performer as Momosuzu Nene from the birthday live hashtag. 2. Identified two vocal segments: 00:03-02:49 and 03:06-05:01. 3. Identified first song title from on-screen text as 'どん天'. Search for lyrics failed; marked as null. 4. Identified second song as 'Perfect-area complete!' from on-screen text and audio. Identified original artist as Natsuko Aso. Searched and retrieved full lyrics for 'Perfect-area complete!'.
response.global_summary: This video features a birthday live performance by the VTuber Momosuzu Nene, covering two songs: 'どん天' (Don-Ten) and 'Perfect-area complete!'. The video includes a short introduction and a brief transition between the two songs.

scenes.description: The performer poses on stage and introduces the song, waving to the audience. No vocal music is playing.
The performer begins singing 'どん天' (Don-Ten), an original song, while dancing on stage surrounded by carrots.
The performer takes a brief break for audience interaction and speaks between songs. No vocal music is playing.
The performer sings 'Perfect-area complete!' with energetic choreography. The stage design shifts to match the theme.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Growing up, what on earth is that? 
What on earth is that!? 
One more chance, one more chance. 
Never, never give up! 
One more chance, one more chance. 
Never give up! 
'A pleasure to meet you!' is such an easier phrase 
There's just one thing that I've been thinking about today 
Doki, goes my heart, will it ever stop beating so fast? 
But I will try hard to make sure this love will last
